pr.title: Drop phantom band-scratch units from progress metric + add CI guard

summary: Fixed progress.py to skip 3 transient band-harness scratch objects (band_trainer_integrated, manual_integrated, band_mtool) that were being counted as real translation units, inflating the function denominator by +783 and silently dropping published code% from ~53% to ~44%. Added a CI sanity gate to prevent recurrence; confirmed the DOL still byte-matched the ROM throughout, so this was a pure measurement fix, not a lost-work regression.
decomp_lessons: The band/near-miss test harness can leave transient scratch .o files (band_*, *_integrated, _int_*, _evt_*, cs_*) in build/GC6E01/base/ that look like real translation units to a naive object-enumerator — always filter these before counting units for progress metrics.

When a progress% metric drops sharply, first check the DOL sha1 against config build.sha1 before assuming real work was lost; here fn/code% dropped ~9 points purely from denominator inflation while the build stayed byte-exact.
fuzzy% staying flat while total_functions jumps is a strong signal of phantom/duplicate units, not real regression.
smart_moves: Added a pure-Python CI gate (no ROM/compiler needed) that fails on any scratch-pattern unit, an out-of-sync denominator, or a duplicate unit signature (same total/matched function counts under a different name) -- catches this class of bug automatically going forward.
naming_conventions: SKIP_BASE_SCRATCH regex: ^(band_|manual_integrated|_int_|_evt_|cs_)|_integrated$ -- shared/kept in sync between tools/progress.py and tools/check_report_sanity.py

key_files.role: iter_base_objects() now skips scratch objects via SKIP_BASE_SCRATCH regex; gen_decomp_report.py reuses this enumeration so the report generator is fixed too.
New CI-gate script: validates report.json has no phantom/scratch units, declared total_functions matches the per-unit sum, and no duplicate unit signatures.
Wires check_report_sanity.py into CI on push/PR to catch this class of measurement bug automatically.
Recomputed aggregates after dropping the 3 phantom units: total_functions 7969, matched 4952, fn% 62.14, code% 44.56.
